untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit double top pattern detection (two distinct peaks at similar levels with a valley between them) and identification of specific price points A, B, and EEDT high. These are structural pattern features that cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and operators without a dedicated pattern recognition function. The rule requires: (1) detection of two swing highs at approximately equal levels, (2) identification of the valley low between them (point A), (3) confirmation of a higher low (point B), and (4) close above the double top resistance. While the entry/exit conditions above use pivot levels as a proxy, they do not capture the true double top pattern logic.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using pivot support (s1) as point A threshold and pivot resistance (r1) as double top resistance level. However, this is not equivalent to true double top pattern detection. A proper implementation would require a dedicated double top detection module or candlestick pattern library. The 63% average rise and 72% bear success rate parameters are informational only and do not translate to entry/exit rules. Regime set to BULL_MARKET as specified in target regimes.
